name: Pershimco Resources Inc.
description: Pershimco Resources Inc. was a junior mineral exploration company based in Quebec, Canada. The company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral resource properties, with the objective of advancing promising projects into operating mines. Its operations primarily involved mineral deposit evaluation and exploration activities. It is important to note that the company has undergone corporate changes and is now known as Pershimex Resources Corporation, which operates as a subsidiary of Abcourt Mines Inc., continuing its focus on mineral exploration within Canada.
